title: sphaerostephanos perglanduliferus
intro: Sphaerostephanos perglanduliferus, also known as the Sphaerostephanos perglanduliferus plant, is a species of fern in the family Drynariaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos perglanduliferus include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and stems for use in teas, infusions, or as a topical ointment.
